input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.4.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.4.5
            TITLE: overcurrent protection is not required on a voltage sense wire if all three of the following

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.4.5: Overcurrent Protection is not required on a voltage sense wire if all three of the following
EV.7.4.5 Overcurrent Protection is not required on a voltage sense wire if all three of the following 
conditions are met: 
• AMS is a distributed AMS system (one cell measurement per board) 
• Sense wire length is less than 25 mm 
• AMS board has Overcurrent Protection

final_answer:
Overcurrent Protection is not required on a voltage sense wire if all three of the following conditions are met:
*   AMS is a distributed AMS system (one cell measurement per board)
*   Sense wire length is less than 25 mm
*   AMS board has Overcurrent Protection
